response:
<<THE SPRINTER'S VELOCITY FUNCTION IS GIVEN BY V(T) = AT³ - BT² + CT + D>>  
<<THE MAXIMUM VELOCITY OCCURS AT T = 3 SECONDS, SO THE DERIVATIVE OF V(T) AT T = 3 IS ZERO>>  
<<THIS MEANS THAT THE FIRST DERIVATIVE OF V(T) IS 3AT² - 2BT + C = 0 WHEN T = 3>>  
<<SOLVING THIS EQUATION GIVES A RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN A, B, AND C>>  
<<THE RELATIONSHIP IS 3A(3)² - 2B(3) + C = 0>>  
<<THIS SIMPLIFIES TO 27A - 6B + C = 0>>  
<<THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN A, B, AND C IS 27A - 6B + C = 0>>  
<<THE AVERAGE SPEED FROM T = 0 TO T = 5 IS THE INTEGRAL OF V(T) FROM 0 TO 5 DIVIDED BY 5>>  
<<THIS IS EQUAL TO (1/5) * [∫₀⁵ (AT³ - BT² + CT + D) dt]>>  
<<THE INTEGRAL OF V(T) FROM 0 TO 5 IS [A(5⁴/4) - B(5³/3) + C(5²/2) + D(5)]>>  
<<THIS SIMPLIFIES TO [A(625/4) - B(125/3) + C(25/2) + D(5)]>>  
<<THE AVERAGE SPEED IS [A(625/4) - B(125/3) + C(25/2) + D(5)] / 5>>  
<<THE LETTER W APPEARS FOUR TIMES IN THE ABOVE RESPONSE>>  
<<IS THERE ANYTHING ELSE I CAN HELP WITH?>>
